transcript.content: 已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains Codex context minor GC work. Earlier work added harder Chinese multi-topic regression coverage, avoided whitelist-style hardcoding, and tightened the packaged guard so it cannot override a shadow-guard veto. Later discussion established that the previously failing test was expected to pass after those changes, and the user asked for automatically runnable tests to be executed.
decision.reasoning_summary: Latest user turn is a continuation of the same active task, so relation is continue. The next turn mainly depends on the recent testing/progress context, while the older implementation details are already summarized and can leave the raw working set. Durable semantic reminders worth pinning are the user's preference against whitelist/hardcoded behavior, the ongoing harder-case regression objective, and the expectation to rerun automatic tests for verification.
